vendor/ third-party libraries:
- pdf.js 5.7.284 — Apache-2.0 — https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js
- mammoth 1.12.0 — BSD-2-Clause — https://github.com/mwilliamson/mammoth.js

PDF.js CMaps, standard fonts, WASM decoders, fallback decoders, and their licence
notices are bundled under pdfjs/ so complex documents remain fully local.
Exact archive provenance and integrity are checked by test/vendor-integrity.js.

Source archives (npm registry):
- pdfjs-dist-5.7.284.tgz — SHA-256 f14db72530dec74fe666910e246242b9bb698df30f0e06622c4471b340a0413d
- mammoth-1.12.0.tgz — SHA-256 5c0c97ec9f8422b6a48f67554fc3060616302ca52715fb6e18c38e798a1e633c
